title: Easiest Peanut Butter Fudge Ever
description: A four-ingredient peanut butter fudge made on the stovetop with sugar, milk, peanut butter, and vanilla.
instructions: In a saucepan, slowly bring the milk and sugar to a boil over medium-low heat.
Boil for exactly 2 and a half minutes, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Remove from heat, stir in the peanut butter and vanilla.
Pour into a greased 8"x8" pan, and let cool before cutting. Enjoy!
